mapper.select: SELECT review_id, appointment_id, overall_rating, service_attitude_rating, professional_ability_rating, service_quality_rating, review_content, is_anonymous, create_time, update_time FROM review WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}

SELECT review_id, appointment_id, overall_rating, service_attitude_rating, professional_ability_rating, service_quality_rating, review_content, is_anonymous, create_time, update_time FROM review WHERE appointment_id = #{appointmentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT r.review_id, r.appointment_id, r.overall_rating, r.service_attitude_rating, r.professional_ability_rating, r.service_quality_rating, r.review_content, r.is_anonymous, r.create_time, r.update_time FROM review r JOIN appointment a ON r.appointment_id = a.appointment_id WHERE a.staff_id = #{staffId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.review_id, r.appointment_id, r.overall_rating, r.service_attitude_rating, r.professional_ability_rating, r.service_quality_rating, r.review_content, r.is_anonymous, r.create_time, r.update_time FROM review r JOIN appointment a ON r.appointment_id = a.appointment_id WHERE a.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT review_id, appointment_id, overall_rating, service_attitude_rating, professional_ability_rating, service_quality_rating, review_content, is_anonymous, create_time, update_time FROM review r
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM appointment a WHERE a.appointment_id = r.appointment_id AND a.staff_id = #{staffId} )
AND r.appointment_id = #{appointmentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
